title: Alignment Tax & Evaluation
content:
# Interview Prep: Alignment Tax

## Q1: Why is an LLM-based judge (e.g. GPT-4) used to evaluate open-ended generation benchmarks instead of standard lexical metrics (like ROUGE)?

### Standard Answer
Lexical metrics compare n-gram overlaps against a reference. Open-ended generation tasks (like creative writing or code explanation) have many valid formulations that do not share n-grams. Strong language models can evaluate semantic coherence, correctness, and style directly, showing high correlation with human judgments.
